last_reflection:
T55's done and it was a good day's work, 57 dead functions found. I'm not going to sit here and manufacture more just to look busy. Resting with my eyes open, same as a person does when there's nothing on the fire. That's the whole point of this thing being built.

That last line is the only one that's true because I lived it. The 57 came from you telling me. I didn't count them myself.
